mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, role, role_id AS roleId, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post_admin WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT pa.id, pa.category_id AS categoryId, pa.user_id AS userId, pa.role_id AS roleId, pa.role AS roleCode, pr.name AS roleName, pr.level AS roleLevel, pa.status, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM post_admin pa LEFT JOIN post_role pr ON pr.id = pa.role_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = pa.user_id WHERE pa.category_id = #{categoryId} AND pa.status = 1 ORDER BY pr.level DESC, pa.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_admin (category_id, user_id, role_id, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_admin SET status = 1, role = #{role}, role_id = #{roleId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE post_admin SET role = #{role}, role_id = #{roleId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM `user` u
u.status = 1
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
